  obtain ⟨τ, hτ, hpτ⟩ := hX
  have hτtop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  have hrc : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∀ n, Function.RightContinuous
      (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) · ω) := by
    refine ae_of_all _ ?_
    intro ω n

    intro i
    by_contra hne
    push_neg at hne
    have : (⨆ n : ℕ, τ n ω) ≤ (i : WithTop ι) := by

    exact top_ne_iff.mp (by simpa [hsup] using this)

  ext i
  have : ∃ n, (i : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := hpos i
  rcases this with ⟨n, hn⟩
  have hmem : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := by
    exact lt_trans (bot_lt_coe i) hn

  simp [stoppedProcess, hle, Set.indicator_of_mem, hmem]

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hp⟩
  have hτtop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top

      intro i

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hstopped⟩
  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone fun n ↦ τ n ω := hτ.mono
  have htend : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (fun n ↦ τ n ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [hmono, htend] with ω hmonoω htendω
  have hRCstopped : ∀ n, Function.RightContinuous fun i ↦
      stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) i ω := by
    intro n
    exact hstopped n ω
  by_cases htop : (∃ n, τ n ω = ⊤)
  · rcases htop with ⟨n, hn⟩
    have hle : ∀ m, (τ n ω : WithTop ι) ≤ τ m ω := fun m ↦ hmonoω (Nat.le_of_lt_succ <|
      lt_of_le_of_ne (hmonoω (Nat.le_succ n)) (by
        intro hEq; exact WithTop.top_ne_bot (by simpa [hn] using hEq.symm)))
    have halltop : ∀ m, τ m ω = ⊤ := by
      intro m
      exact top_unique <| hn ▸ hle m
    have hmem : ∀ (i : ι) (m : ℕ), ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ m ω} := by
      intro i m
      simp [halltop m]
    have hstop_eq : ∀ (i : ι) (m : ℕ),
        stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ m ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ m) i ω = X i ω := by
      intro i m
      have : (τ m ω : WithTop ι) = ⊤ := halltop m
      simp [stoppedProcess, this, hmem i m]
    have hRC : Function.RightContinuous fun i ↦ X i ω := by
      have := hRCstopped 0
      simpa [hstop_eq] using this
    exact hRC
  · have hneTop : ∀ n, τ n ω ≠ ⊤ := by
      intro n hn
      exact htop ⟨n, hn⟩
    have hTopι : Tendsto (fun n ↦ (τ n ω).untopD ⊥) atTop atTop := by
      simpa [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] using htendω
    have hcover : ∀ i : ι, ∃ n, i < (τ n ω).untopD ⊥ := by
      intro i
      have : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, i < (τ n ω).untopD ⊥ := (tendsto_atTop.1 hTopι) i
      exact (this.exists)
    have hRC : Function.RightContinuous fun i ↦ X i ω := by
      intro i
      rcases hcover i with ⟨n, hn⟩
      have hlt : (i : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
        have : τ n ω = (↑((τ n ω).untopD ⊥) : WithTop ι) := by
          cases hτn : τ n ω <;> simp [WithTop.untopD, WithTop.coe_eq_coe] at *
          · exact (hneTop n (by simpa [hτn] using rfl)).elim
          · simp [WithTop.untopD, hτn]
        simpa [this] using (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.2 hn)
      have hmem : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := by
        have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < (i : WithTop ι) := by
          simpa using (WithTop.bot_lt_coe i)
        exact lt_trans this hlt
      have hstop_eq : ∀ j, j ≤ i →
          stoppedProcess (fun j ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X j)) (τ n) j ω = X j ω := by
        intro j hj
        have hlt' : (j : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_of_le_of_lt (WithTop.coe_le_coe.2 hj) hlt
        have hmem' : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := hmem
        simp [stoppedProcess, hlt', Set.indicator_of_mem, hmem']
      have hstop_eq' : stoppedProcess (fun j ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X j)) (τ n) i ω = X i ω :=
        hstop_eq i le_rfl
      have hstop_eq_near : ∀ᶠ j in 𝓝[>] i,
          stoppedProcess (fun j ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X j)) (τ n) j ω = X j ω := by
        have : ∀ᶠ j in 𝓝[>] i, j ≤ i := by
          simpa [nhdsWithin, Filter.principal, Filter.mem_inf] using
            (Filter.eventually_of_forall fun j ↦ le_of_lt)
        filter_upwards [this] with j hj using hstop_eq j hj
      have hRCi := hRCstopped n i
      have hRCi' : Function.RightContinuous fun j ↦ X j ω := by
        refine (hRCi.congr ?_).trans ?_
        · intro j
          by_cases hj : j ≤ i
          · exact (hstop_eq j hj).symm
          · by_cases hji : i < j
            · have : (j : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_of_lt_of_le (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.2 hji) ?_
              · exact hstop_eq' ▸ hlt
              · simp [stoppedProcess, this, Set.indicator_of_mem, hmem]
            · have : j = i := le_antisymm (le_of_not_gt hji) (le_of_not_ge hj)
              simp [this, hstop_eq']
        · simpa [hstop_eq'] using (Function.RightContinuous.congr_of_eventuallyEq hRCi hstop_eq_near).1
      exact hRCi'
    exact hRC

classical
  by_cases hP : P = 0

classical

  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone (τ · ω) := hτ.mono

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone (τ · ω) := hτ.mono
  have htend : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top

have hτ := hX.IsLocalizingSequence
  have hrc : ∀ n, ∀ ω, Function.RightContinuous
      ((stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X i)) (hX.localSeq n)) · ω) :=

      have hopen : IsOpen ({t : WithTop ι | ⊥ < t} : Set (WithTop ι)) := by
        simpa [Set.setOf_app_iff] using isOpen_Ioi
      have hmem : ⊤ ∈ ({t : WithTop ι | ⊥ < t} : Set (WithTop ι)) := by simp
      exact (hopen.mem_nhds hmem).eventually (hω)
    rcases (this.and_eventually (hτ.mono)).exists with ⟨m, hmpos, hmono⟩
    have hle : hX.localSeq n ω ≤ hX.localSeq m ω := hmono n (le_trans (le_max_left _ _) le_rfl)

  have hst : ∀ n, stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω}.indicator (X i))

    intro n
    funext i
    have : i ≤ (hX.localSeq n ω).untop := by
      by_cases htop' : hX.localSeq n ω = ⊤
      · simp [htop']
      · have : (hX.localSeq n ω).untop = (Option.get _ (WithTop.ne_top_iff_one.1 htop')).1 := rfl
        simp
    have hmem : ω ∈ {ω' | ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω'} := by simpa using hpos n
    simp [stoppedProcess, hmem]
  have hrc' : ∀ n, Function.RightContinuous (X · ω) := by
    intro n
    have := hrc n ω
    simpa [hst n] using this
  exact hrc' 0

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hτTop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [hτTop] with ω hωτ
  intro x
  by_cases hx : x = ⊥
  · subst hx
    simpa using (Function.rightContinuous_const : Function.RightContinuous fun _ : ι => X ⊥ ω)
  · have hxlt : (x : WithTop ι) < ⊤ := WithTop.coe_lt_top x
    rcases (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.mp hωτ) x with ⟨n, hn⟩
    have hnx : (x : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := (hn n le_rfl) hxlt
    have hmem : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := by
      have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_trans (WithTop.bot_lt_coe x) hnx
      simpa [Set.mem_setOf_eq] using this
    have hRC := hτX n ω
    have hxstop :
        (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) · ω) x = X x ω := by
      have hxeq : (x : WithTop ι) ≤ min (τ n ω) x := by
        simp [hnx.le]
      simp [stoppedProcess, hxeq, Set.indicator_of_mem hmem]
    have hEqNear :
        ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[>] x,
          (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) · ω) y = X y ω := by
      have : ∀ᶠ y in 𝓝[>] x, (y : WithTop ι) < τ n ω :=
        (tendsto_principal.1 <| Ioi_mem_nhdsWithin_Ioi.2 hnx).mono (by
          intro y hy; simpa [Set.mem_setOf_eq] using hy)
      filter_upwards [this] with y hy
      have hmem' : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := by
        have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_trans (WithTop.bot_lt_coe x) hnx
        simpa [Set.mem_setOf_eq] using this
      have hyeq : (y : WithTop ι) ≤ min (τ n ω) y := by simp [hy.le]
      simp [stoppedProcess, hyeq, Set.indicator_of_mem hmem']
    have hT :
        Tendsto (fun y ↦ X y ω) (𝓝[>] x) (𝓝 (X x ω)) := by
      have hT' :=

    have hT2 : Tendsto (fun y ↦ X y ω) (𝓝[≥] x) (𝓝 (X x ω)) := by
      have : 𝓝[≥] x = 𝓝[>] x ⊔ 𝓟 {x} := by
        ext s; simp [nhdsWithin_union, nhdsWithin_singleton]
      rw [this]
      refine tendsto_sup.2 ?_
      refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
      · exact hT
      · simpa using (tendsto_principal.2 <| by simp)
    exact Function.rightContinuous_iff_tendsto.2 hT2

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hst⟩

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩

  refine fun t ht => ?_
  rcases hforall t with ⟨n, hn⟩
  have hEq : (fun x ↦ X (min x (τ n ω)) ω) = fun x ↦ X x ω := by
    funext x
    have : (x : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := by
      exact le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_coe.2 (le_of_lt (ht x))) hn)
    simp [min_eq_left_iff, this]
  simpa [hEq] using (hrcω n) t ht

classical
  simpa [Locally] using (hX.stoppedProcess 0)

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone fun n ↦ τ n ω := hτ.mono
  have htend : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (fun n ↦ τ n ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [hmono, htend] with ω hmonoω htendω
  have htopω : ∀ i : ι, ∃ n : ℕ, (i : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
    intro i
    have := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.mp htendω) i
    rcases this with ⟨n, hn⟩
    refine ⟨n, ?_⟩
    exact hn n le_rfl
  have hRCstopped : ∀ n, Function.RightContinuous fun x =>
      stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) x ω := by
    intro n
    exact hτX n ω
  refine Function.RightContinuous.of_eqOn_Ici (s := fun i ↦ (0 : ι)) (t := fun i ↦ X i ω) ?_
  intro i hi
  rcases htopω i with ⟨n, hn⟩
  have hle : (i : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := le_of_lt hn
  have hmem : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := by
    have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_trans (by simpa using (show (⊥ : WithTop ι) < (i : WithTop ι) from WithTop.bot_lt_coe i)) hn
    simpa [Set.mem_setOf_eq] using this
  have : stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) i ω = X i ω := by
    unfold stoppedProcess
    simp [hle, Set.indicator_of_mem hmem]
  simpa [this]

rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone (τ · ω) := hτ.mono
  have htend : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  have hrc : ∀ n, ∀ ω, Function.RightContinuous
      (fun x ↦ stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) x ω) := by
    intro n ω
    exact (hτX n) ω
  filter_upwards [hmono, htend] with ω hmonoω htendω
  classical
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at htendω
  refine fun t => ?_
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := htendω t
  have htlt : (t : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
    have := hn n le_rfl
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_rfl : (t : WithTop ι) ≤ t) this
  have htmem : ω ∈ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω} := by
    have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < (t : WithTop ι) := by simp
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_of_lt htlt)
  have hle : (t : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := le_of_lt htlt
  have hst_eq :
      (fun s => stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) s ω)
        = fun s => X s ω := by
    funext s
    have hsle : (s : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := by
      have : (s : WithTop ι) ≤ t := by exact_mod_cast (show s ≤ t from le_of_lt (show s < t by simpa using (show s < t from by
        have := (hrc n ω).continuousWithinAt
        trivial)))
      exact this.trans hle
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le (τ := τ n) (i := s) (ω := ω) hsle, Set.indicator_of_mem]
    · rfl
    · exact htmem
  have : Function.RightContinuous
      (fun s => stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) s ω) :=
    hrc n ω
  simpa [hst_eq] using this

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone (τ · ω) := hτ.mono
  have htop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [hmono, htop] with ω hmonoω htopω
  have hω : ∀ n, Function.RightContinuous
      (stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) · ω) := by
    intro n
    exact hτX n ω
  intro x
  have hx : ∃ n, (x : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
    have := (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff).1 htopω x
    rcases this with ⟨n, hn⟩
    refine ⟨n, ?_⟩
    simpa [eventually_atTop] using hn n le_rfl
  rcases hx with ⟨n, hxn⟩
  have hlt : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hxn
  have hEq :
      (fun t => stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) t ω)
        = fun t => X t ω := by
    funext t
    have ht : (t : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_of_le_of_lt (WithTop.coe_le_coe.2 le_rfl) hxn
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_lt]
    · simp [Set.indicator_of_mem, hlt]
    · exact ht
  simpa [Function.RightContinuous, hEq] using (hω n) x

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hst⟩
  have hτtop := hτ.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [hτtop] with ω hω
  have hτω : Tendsto (fun n ↦ τ n ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hω
  have hRCn : ∀ n, Function.RightContinuous fun t ↦ X (min t (τ n ω)) ω := by
    intro n
    have h := hst n ω
    simpa [stoppedProcess, Function.comp, Set.indicator, Pi.mul_def] using h
  have hmin : ∀ t, Tendsto (fun n ↦ min t (τ n ω)) atTop (𝓝 t) := by
    intro t
    have : Tendsto (fun x : WithTop ι ↦ min t x) (𝓝 ⊤) (𝓝 t) := by
      simpa using (tendsto_const_nhds.min tendsto_id)
    exact this.comp hτω
  refine Function.RightContinuous.of_tendsto (fun t => ?_) (fun t => ?_)
  · have ht := (hmin t)
    have hfun : Tendsto (fun n ↦ X (min t (τ n ω)) ω) atTop (𝓝 (X t ω)) := by
      simpa using (ht.map (X · ω))
    exact hfun
  · intro t
    have ht := hmin t
    have hlim : Tendsto (fun n ↦ fun s => X (min s (τ n ω)) ω) atTop
        (𝓝 (fun s => X s ω)) := by
      refine tendsto_pi_nhds.2 ?_
      intro s
      simpa using (hmin s).map (X · ω)
    have := (tendsto_principal.2 (Set.mem_of_superset (by trivial) (by intro; trivial)))
    exact (hRCn 0) t
simpa using hX.stoppedProcess 0

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone fun n ↦ (τ n ω : WithTop ι) := hτ.mono
  have htop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (fun n ↦ τ n ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [hmono, htop] with ω hmonoω htopω
  have hRC' : ∀ n, Function.RightContinuous fun t ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X t) ω := by
    intro n
    have := hτX n ω
    simpa [stoppedProcess, Function.comp] using this
  have hmem : ∀ i : ι, ∃ n, (i : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
    intro i
    have : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, (i : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
      simpa [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] using htopω i
    rcases (this.exists) with ⟨n, hn⟩
    exact ⟨n, hn⟩
  intro i
  rcases hmem i with ⟨n, hn⟩
  have hEq : (fun t ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X t) ω) = fun t ↦ X t ω := by
    funext t
    have : (ω ∈ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}) := by
      show (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le (bot_lt_coe i) (le_of_lt hn)
    simp [Set.indicator_of_mem, this]
  simpa [hEq] using (hRC' n) i

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hpτ⟩
  have hτtop : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone (τ · ω) := hτ.mono
  filter_upwards [hτtop, hmono] with ω htop hmonoω
  have hrc : ∀ n, Function.RightContinuous
      (fun i => stoppedProcess (fun j => {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X j)) (τ n) i ω) := by
    intro n
    simpa using hpτ n ω
  intro t
  have ht' : ∃ n, (t : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
    have : Tendsto (fun n => τ n ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := htop
    rcases (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 this t) with ⟨n, hn⟩
    refine ⟨n, ?_⟩
    specialize hn n le_rfl
    exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by simpa using (WithTop.coe_lt_top t)) hn
  rcases ht' with ⟨n, hlt⟩
  have hle : (t : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := le_of_lt hlt
  have hEq : (fun i => X i ω) = fun i =>
      stoppedProcess (fun j => {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X j)) (τ n) i ω := by
    funext i
    have : (i : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := (le_of_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt (by simpa using (WithTop.coe_lt_top i)) hlt))
    simp [stoppedProcess, this, Set.indicator_of_mem, hlt.ne_bot]
  simpa [hEq] using hrc n t

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hτX⟩
  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone (fun n ↦ τ n ω) := hτ.mono
  have htend : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (fun n ↦ τ n ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  have hRC : ∀ n, ∀ ω, Function.RightContinuous
      (fun i ↦ stoppedProcess (fun i ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X i)) (τ n) i ω) := by
    intro n ω
    simpa using hτX n ω
  filter_upwards [hmono, htend] with ω hmonoω htendω
  refine Function.rightContinuous_iff.2 ?_
  intro i
  by_cases hi : τ 0 ω = ⊤
  · have htop : ∀ n, τ n ω = ⊤ := by
      intro n
      have hle : τ 0 ω ≤ τ n ω := hmonoω (Nat.zero_le n)
      exact top_unique (hi ▸ hle)
    have hXeq : ∀ j, X j ω =
        stoppedProcess (fun j ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ 0 ω}.indicator (X j)) (τ 0) j ω := by
      intro j
      have hmem : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ 0 ω} := by
        simp [hi]
      simp [stoppedProcess, hmem, htop 0]
    have hRC0 := hRC 0 ω
    simpa [Function.rightContinuous_iff, hXeq] using (hRC0 i)
  · have hhit : ∃ n, (i : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
      have htop' : τ 0 ω < ⊤ := lt_top_iff_ne_top.2 hi
      have htend' : Tendsto (fun n ↦ τ n ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := htendω
      rcases (WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff.1 htend') i with ⟨N, hN⟩
      refine ⟨max N 0, ?_⟩
      have : (i : WithTop ι) < τ (max N 0) ω := hN (max N 0) (le_max_left _ _)
      exact this
    rcases hhit with ⟨n, hin⟩
    have hle : (i : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := le_of_lt hin
    have hEq : ∀ j, j ≤ i → X j ω =
        stoppedProcess (fun j ↦ {ω | ⊥ < τ n ω}.indicator (X j)) (τ n) j ω := by
      intro j hj
      have hmem : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := by
        have : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < (i : WithTop ι) := by simp
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (le_trans (by exact_mod_cast hj) hle)
      have hst : stoppedValue (τ n) j ω = j := by
        simp [stoppedValue, min_eq_left_iff, le_trans (by exact_mod_cast hj) hle]
      simp [stoppedProcess, hmem, hst]
    have hRCn := hRC n ω
    have hRCi : ContinuousWithinAt (fun x : ι => X x ω) (Ioi i) i := by
      have := (hRCn i)
      -- unfold right continuity at i from the stopped process, then rewrite values on (Ioi i) near i
      simpa [Function.RightContinuous, ContinuousWithinAt, hEq, hle] using this
    simpa [Function.rightContinuous_iff] using hRCi

classical
  rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hpτ⟩
  have hmono : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Monotone (τ · ω) := hτ.mono
  have htend : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (τ · ω) atTop (𝓝 ⊤) := hτ.tendsto_top
  filter_upwards [hmono, htend] with ω hmonoω htendω
  have htop : ∀ i : ι, ∃ n : ℕ, (i : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := by
    intro i
    have : (∃ n, (i : WithTop ι) < τ n ω) := by
      simpa [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] using htendω i
    simpa using this
  intro i
  rcases htop i with ⟨n, hn⟩
  have hτpos : (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω := lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le hn
  have hmem : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := by simpa using hτpos
  have hrc := hpτ n ω
  have hEq :
      (fun x => stoppedProcess (fun j => {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω}.indicator (X j)) (τ n) x ω)
        = fun x => X x ω := by
    funext x
    have hx : (x : WithTop ι) ≤ τ n ω := le_trans (le_of_lt hn) (le_of_lt (hmonoω (Nat.le_add_left n x)))
    have hmem' : ω ∈ {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω} := hmem
    simp [stoppedProcess, hx, Set.indicator_of_mem, hmem']
  have hrc' :
      Function.RightContinuous
        (fun x =>
          stoppedProcess (fun j => {ω | (⊥ : WithTop ι) < τ n ω}.indicator (X j)) (τ n) x ω) := by
    simpa using hrc
  simpa [hEq] using hrc'
